questions.question: Explain the difference between the open() function and the creat() function, providing an example of when to use each.
questions.hint: Provide a clear explanation and example

questions.question: Write a C program to create a new file using the creat() function and then read from it using the read() function. Explain the output.
questions.hint: Use the creat() and read() functions as specified

questions.question: What is the purpose of the fcntl() function in file I/O operations? Provide an example of how to use it to lock a file for exclusive access.
questions.hint: Explain the purpose and provide an example
